ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-11-2024 Continued To Apr-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Personal Representative Lauren Xavier, in propria persona, to appear on Apr-22-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. An Order to Show Cause as to why Lauren Xavier should not be sanctioned $250 for failing to appear, is set for Apr-22-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. A Status of Filing Inventory and Appraisal is added to the same date. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.
